goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:30' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:30 and should go to stansted airport
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get train ID, price, and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
